scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n contracts,domain,fixtures,api,web "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev:domain" "npm run dev:fixtures" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @economy-cash/contracts && npm run build --workspace @economy-cash/domain-core && npm run build --workspace @economy-cash/test-fixtures && npm run build --workspace @economy-cash/api && npm run build --workspace @economy-cash/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @economy-cash/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @economy-cash/domain-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @economy-cash/test-fixtures && npm run typecheck --workspace @economy-cash/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @economy-cash/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
